description_long: This lamp is designed in the whimsical shape of an anglerfish, with a metallic, weathered body and skeletal wire fins. The main body is sculpted to resemble the head and mouth of the fish, complete with pronounced eye sockets and jagged teeth. A thin, curved rod extends from the top of the head, ending in a single exposed bulb that mimics the bioluminescent lure of a real anglerfish. The fins and tail are constructed from thin metal rods, giving a skeletal, artistic appearance. The lamp is mounted on a sturdy, faceted base, suggesting stability for floor placement. The overall finish is rustic and industrial, with a patina that adds character and a sense of age.
description: A whimsical anglerfish-shaped floor lamp with a weathered metal body, wire fins, and a single exposed bulb on a curved rod. The design is rustic and artistic, mounted on a sturdy base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the anglerfish's open mouth, wire fins, and the curved rod with the bulb extending forward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the fish's face, eye sockets, teeth, and the bulb positioned directly in front of the mouth.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fish's body curve, wire fins, and the bulb's position relative to the mouth.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the fish's head, the wire tail fin, and the base.
